# Node Interface

## CloudSec

Note: Feature *should* work. No environment available to test it (yet).

Node selection options:
  - single node
  - selected nodes
  - all nodes
  - [multi APIC](./InterfaceCloudSecNodesApics.md)

Filter options:
  - Interface ID
  - Admin State
  - Oper State

Output options:
  - state
  - verbose
  - json
